title: ODS Review Verdict v1
description: One AI code reviewer's conclusion about a change, consumed by `ods check --ai-review`. Verdicts are probabilistic signals: by default they may only tighten the gate (route additional human review), never deny and never loosen — a policy must opt in explicitly for LLM findings to block.

schema.description: Version stamp for this document shape.

model.description: Model identifier used for the review, when known.

head_sha.description: Commit the review applies to. Implementations MUST skip verdicts whose head_sha does not match the evaluated HEAD (abbreviations of one another match); stale opinions never enter the gate. Omitted means unstamped and applicable.

verdict.description: Overall conclusion. request_changes SHOULD raise review routing to elevated by default; approve MUST NOT loosen the gate (e.g. must never qualify a change for the auto tier by itself).

category.description: Free-form finding class, e.g. correctness, design, security, test-coverage.
